title: Enneads I.6: On Beauty
description: Plotinus on how the soul recognizes beauty because it is itself beautiful — and how to ascend from physical to spiritual beauty.
introduction: Plotinus on how the soul recognizes beauty because it is itself beautiful — and how to ascend from physical to spiritual beauty.

translation.text: The soul that has become ugly through vice must purify itself to see the beautiful. Withdraw into yourself and look.
